changelog: Multi-Agent Discord Gateway — Discord bot now auto-detects agency agents and creates dedicated channels for each (CTO, Flutter, QA, etc.). Messages in #cto route to the CTO agent, #flutter to Flutter, etc. Auto channel setup, slash commands with agent selection, streaming responses. Run ./tamerclaw discord setup to configure.

new.desc: Create Discord server channels for agency agents
List all available AI agents (Discord slash command)
Switch to a specific agent in current channel
Create agent channels in Discord server (admin)

existing.desc: Set up Discord bot (now with multi-agent mode)
Send a message (auto-routes to channel's agent)
Show bot status with agent info (Discord)

history.changelog: Discord support — TamerClaw agents now work on Discord. Full slash commands, streaming responses, multi-language, session management, media handling.
Fix /whatsnew and /changelog commands — wired handlers into bot-template and bridge

Post-update announcement system — Supreme Agent now announces what's new after every ./tamerclaw update. New /changelog and /whatsnew commands for all agents. Feature knowledge base maps modules to user-facing commands.

Full agency delegation infrastructure — 18 new shared modules (delegation-router, task-registry, team-discovery, coordinator, etc.), Mac Mini GUI automation, updated bridge/supreme with dynamic model routing, hardened inbox-watcher with phantom detection.

Agency Powerup — ./tamerclaw powerup sets up a full software agency with CTO, CMO, and specialized agents. Includes 17 new shared modules, mobile store publishing pipeline, and Anthropic SDK integration.
Friendly API error messages — billing limits, rate limits, auth errors now show clean user-facing messages instead of raw JSON dumps
All Claude models online + Mac Mini compute tools
